description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.title: Article 38
tasks.prompt: You see this announcement in an English-language magazine.||Articles wanted!||Teenage activities||Write your article.
tasks.modelAnswer: Student activities||Many teenagers enjoy spending time with friends and taking part in different activities after school or at weekends. Popular activities include sports, music, films and meeting people in cafés or parks.||I think these activities are important because they help students relax and forget about school stress for a while. They also improve confidence and communication skills. Teachers and parents usually support activities that encourage teamwork and creativity among young people.||In conclusion, having interesting activities is an important part of teenage life and can help students feel happier and more confident.

tasks.title: Story
tasks.prompt: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.||Your story must begin with this sentence:||I was the only person left in the sports hall.||Write your story.
tasks.startingSentence: I was the only person left in the sports hall.
tasks.modelAnswer: I was the only person left in the sports hall. At first, I did not understand what was happening, but after a few minutes everything became clear. My friends and family helped solve the problem, and soon everybody felt much calmer again.||Later that day, we talked about the situation and laughed together because it had seemed much more serious at the beginning. Although the experience was unexpected, it became a funny memory that I will always remember.||When I finally went home that evening, I felt tired but extremely happy about the way everything ended.
